name: Energia
short_description: This short but sweet game presents a polished combination of tower defense and base building. Manage your energy network to both defend from and attack foes all while enjoying a clean, zero budget art style.
detailed_description:
Made by a single developer, Energia is a base building game in which you create and manage an energy network. Each level provides an interesting new spin on the core mechanics to keep you on your toes encouraging adaptation and creativity. Energia's simple design is accessible to all while providing depth for those who seek it.

10 levels
Hard version of each level
